Title: Mixed-cart cart-% coupon base — simple physical USD line (baseline)
Section: GraphQL > xCart > Mixed Cart > Coupon Leak Repro
Preconditions: Runner-native. LOYALTY_VIP_USER. Loyalty mode Mixed Cart, currency PTS. Baseline VCST-5101 Bug-1 repro on a simple physical USD line (BUYABLE_NO_MIN_QTY). Fresh cart -> add 1x USD product -> apply QA10OFF -> capture USD-only coupon discount + USD extendedPrice -> add 1x live-discovered PTS loyalty product -> re-query. Coupon discount MUST stay equal to USD-only baseline (= 10% x USD extendedPrice). RED on current build (leak).
Steps:
[AUTH role=LOYALTY_VIP_USER]
[GQL-OP setup_me]
  query { me { id } }
[GQL-EXEC setup_me]
[GQL-CAPTURE setup_me.data.me.id → USER_ID]
[GQL-OP cleanup_pre]
  mutation { clearCart(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC cleanup_pre]
[GQL-OP discover_pts_product]
  query { products(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" currencyCode: "@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code)" first: 1 filter: "category.subtree:@td(VIRTUAL_CATALOG_B2B.id) price.@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code):(0 TO)") { items { id } } }
[GQL-EXEC discover_pts_product]
[GQL-CAPTURE discover_pts_product.data.products.items.0.id → PTS_PRODUCT_ID]
[GQL-OP add_usd_item]
  mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" productId: "@td(BUYABLE_NO_MIN_QTY.id)" quantity: 1 }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC add_usd_item]
[GQL-OP apply_coupon]
  mutation { addCoupon(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" cultureName: "en-US" couponCode: "@td(COUPONS.percentageCode)" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC apply_coupon]
[GQL-OP cart_usd_only]
  query { cart(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US") { subTotal { amount } discountTotal { amount } discounts { amount coupon } items { currencyCode quantity listPrice { amount } salePrice { amount } placedPrice { amount } extendedPrice { amount } discountTotal { amount } } } }
[GQL-EXEC cart_usd_only]
[GQL-CAPTURE cart_usd_only.data.cart.discounts[?coupon=@td(COUPONS.percentageCode)].amount → COUPON_DISC_BASE]
[GQL-CAPTURE cart_usd_only.data.cart.items[?currencyCode=USD].extendedPrice.amount → USD_EXT_PRICE]
[GQL-CAPTURE cart_usd_only.data.cart.subTotal.amount → USD_SUBTOTAL]
[GQL-OP add_pts_item]
  mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" productId: "{{PTS_PRODUCT_ID}}" quantity: 1 itemCurrencyCode: "@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code)" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC add_pts_item]
[GQL-OP cart_mixed]
  query { cart(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US") { subTotal { amount } discountTotal { amount } discounts { amount coupon } cartTotals { isDefaultTotalCurrency discountTotal { amount } total { currency { code } } } items { currencyCode quantity listPrice { amount } extendedPrice { amount currency { code } } discountTotal { amount } } } }
[GQL-EXEC cart_mixed]
[GQL-CAPTURE cart_mixed.data.cart.discounts[?coupon=@td(COUPONS.percentageCode)].amount → COUPON_DISC_MIX]
[GQL-CAPTURE cart_mixed.data.cart.items[?currencyCode=@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code)].extendedPrice.amount → PTS_EXT_PRICE]
[GQL-OP cleanup_post]
  mutation { clearCart(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC cleanup_post]
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=cart_usd_only] errors[] empty
[DATA label=cart_usd_only] data.cart.discounts[?coupon=@td(COUPONS.percentageCode)].amount is non-null
[ERRORS label=cart_mixed] errors[] empty
[VAR] {{COUPON_DISC_MIX}} = {{COUPON_DISC_BASE}}
[DATA label=cart_mixed] data.cart.items[?currencyCode=@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code)].discountTotal.amount = 0
[DATA label=cart_mixed] data.cart.cartTotals[?isDefaultTotalCurrency=false].discountTotal.amount = 0
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] COUPON_DISC_MIX must equal COUPON_DISC_BASE (= 10% x USD extendedPrice). PTS line + PTS cartTotals block discountTotal = 0.
Failure_Signals: Coupon discount grows after the PTS line is added (PTS value folded into the cart-% coupon base at 1:1); PTS line/PTS cartTotals shows non-zero discountTotal.

Title: Mixed-cart cart-% coupon base — variation-parent on sale (list vs actual price probe)
Section: GraphQL > xCart > Mixed Cart > Coupon Leak Repro
Preconditions: Runner-native. LOYALTY_VIP_USER. USD line = PROD_VARIATION_PARENT_SALE (physical variation-parent, list 17.99 -> actual 13.99). Same flow as R1. ADDITIONALLY captures the USD line listPrice, salePrice, placedPrice, extendedPrice so the discount delta reveals whether the coupon base uses LIST or ACTUAL (sale) price.

[VAR] {{COUPON_DISC_MIX}} = {{COUPON_DISC_BASE}}

Title: Mixed-cart cart-% coupon base — variation CHILD as USD line
Section: GraphQL > xCart > Mixed Cart > Coupon Leak Repro
Preconditions: Runner-native. LOYALTY_VIP_USER. USD line = a variation CHILD. First verifies SEED_20260529_VARIATION_PARENT.variation_gray_id is virtual-catalog-linked (products query filtered by category.subtree:VIRTUAL_CATALOG_B2B); if the seeded child returns 0 items, the discover query also returns the first available variation child in the catalog as a fallback (capture handles both). Same coupon-leak flow as R1.
Steps:
[AUTH role=LOYALTY_VIP_USER]
[GQL-OP setup_me]
  query { me { id } }
[GQL-EXEC setup_me]
[GQL-CAPTURE setup_me.data.me.id → USER_ID]
[GQL-OP cleanup_pre]
  mutation { clearCart(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC cleanup_pre]
[GQL-OP verify_child_linked]
  query { products(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" currencyCode: "USD" first: 1 filter: "category.subtree:@td(VIRTUAL_CATALOG_B2B.id) productType:Physical" query: "@td(SEED_20260529_VARIATION_PARENT.variation_gray_sku)") { totalCount items { id code productType } } }
[GQL-EXEC verify_child_linked]
[GQL-OP discover_usd_child]
  query { products(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" currencyCode: "USD" first: 1 filter: "category.subtree:@td(VIRTUAL_CATALOG_B2B.id) is:variation price.USD:(0 TO)") { totalCount items { id code productType } } }
[GQL-EXEC discover_usd_child]
[GQL-CAPTURE discover_usd_child.data.products.items.0.id → USD_CHILD_ID]
[GQL-OP discover_pts_product]
  query { products(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" currencyCode: "@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code)" first: 1 filter: "category.subtree:@td(VIRTUAL_CATALOG_B2B.id) price.@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code):(0 TO)") { items { id } } }
[GQL-EXEC discover_pts_product]
[GQL-CAPTURE discover_pts_product.data.products.items.0.id → PTS_PRODUCT_ID]
[GQL-OP add_usd_item]
  mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" productId: "{{USD_CHILD_ID}}" quantity: 1 }) { id items { id productId productType } } }
[GQL-EXEC add_usd_item]
[GQL-OP apply_coupon]
  mutation { addCoupon(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" cultureName: "en-US" couponCode: "@td(COUPONS.percentageCode)" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC apply_coupon]
[GQL-OP cart_usd_only]
  query { cart(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US") { subTotal { amount } discounts { amount coupon } items { currencyCode quantity productType listPrice { amount } salePrice { amount } extendedPrice { amount } discountTotal { amount } } } }
[GQL-EXEC cart_usd_only]
[GQL-CAPTURE cart_usd_only.data.cart.discounts[?coupon=@td(COUPONS.percentageCode)].amount → COUPON_DISC_BASE]
[GQL-CAPTURE cart_usd_only.data.cart.items[?currencyCode=USD].extendedPrice.amount → USD_EXT_PRICE]
[GQL-OP add_pts_item]
  mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" productId: "{{PTS_PRODUCT_ID}}" quantity: 1 itemCurrencyCode: "@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code)" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC add_pts_item]
[GQL-OP cart_mixed]
  query { cart(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US") { subTotal { amount } discounts { amount coupon } cartTotals { isDefaultTotalCurrency discountTotal { amount } } items { currencyCode quantity extendedPrice { amount } discountTotal { amount } } } }
[GQL-EXEC cart_mixed]
[GQL-CAPTURE cart_mixed.data.cart.discounts[?coupon=@td(COUPONS.percentageCode)].amount → COUPON_DISC_MIX]
[GQL-CAPTURE cart_mixed.data.cart.items[?currencyCode=@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code)].extendedPrice.amount → PTS_EXT_PRICE]
[GQL-OP cleanup_post]
  mutation { clearCart(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC cleanup_post]
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=verify_child_linked] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=discover_usd_child] errors[] empty
[DATA label=discover_usd_child] data.products.items.0.id is non-null
[ERRORS label=add_usd_item] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=cart_usd_only] errors[] empty
[DATA label=cart_usd_only] data.cart.discounts[?coupon=@td(COUPONS.percentageCode)].amount is non-null
[ERRORS label=cart_mixed] errors[] empty
[VAR] {{COUPON_DISC_MIX}} = {{COUPON_DISC_BASE}}
[DATA label=cart_mixed] data.cart.items[?currencyCode=@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code)].discountTotal.amount = 0
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] verify_child_linked.totalCount documents whether the seeded gray child is virtual-catalog-linked. USD line is a variation child. COUPON_DISC_MIX must equal COUPON_DISC_BASE.
Failure_Signals: Coupon discount grows after PTS line added; variation child not addable to cart (separate finding).

Title: Mixed-cart cart-% coupon base — CONFIGURABLE product as USD line
Section: GraphQL > xCart > Mixed Cart > Coupon Leak Repro
Preconditions: Runner-native. LOYALTY_VIP_USER. USD line = a CONFIGURED line item (CFG_LAPTOP, two required Product sections). Discovers the section/option IDs via productConfiguration, adds the configured line via addItem with configurationSections (per 050i), applies QA10OFF, then adds a PTS loyalty line. If the platform rejects the configurable+mixed-cart combination, the error is recorded verbatim (itself a finding). Coupon discount must stay equal to USD-only baseline.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_item] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_item] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=cart_usd_only] errors[] empty
[DATA label=cart_usd_only] data.cart.discounts[?coupon=@td(COUPONS.percentageCode)].amount is non-null
[ERRORS label=cart_mixed] errors[] empty
[VAR] {{COUPON_DISC_MIX}} = {{COUPON_DISC_BASE}}
[DATA label=cart_mixed] data.cart.items[?currencyCode=@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code)].discountTotal.amount = 0
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] Configured line as USD line in a mixed cart. If add_item errors[] non-empty the combination is rejected (record verbatim). COUPON_DISC_MIX must equal COUPON_DISC_BASE.
Failure_Signals: add_item errors[] non-empty (platform rejects configurable in mixed cart — record error verbatim); coupon discount grows after PTS line added.

Title: Mixed-cart cart-% coupon — PTS qty-step signature 1->2->3 on baseline
Section: GraphQL > xCart > Mixed Cart > Coupon Leak Repro
Preconditions: Runner-native. LOYALTY_VIP_USER. USD line constant (BUYABLE_NO_MIN_QTY, qty 1). PTS line stepped qty 1 -> 2 -> 3 via changeCartItemQuantity. Captures the coupon discount at each step. Bug signature: discount grows by exactly 10% x PTS unit value per step. Captures PTS unit value (extendedPrice/quantity) to compute the expected per-step delta.
Steps:
[AUTH role=LOYALTY_VIP_USER]
[GQL-OP setup_me]
  query { me { id } }
[GQL-EXEC setup_me]
[GQL-CAPTURE setup_me.data.me.id → USER_ID]
[GQL-OP cleanup_pre]
  mutation { clearCart(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC cleanup_pre]
[GQL-OP discover_pts_product]
  query { products(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" currencyCode: "@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code)" first: 1 filter: "category.subtree:@td(VIRTUAL_CATALOG_B2B.id) price.@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code):(0 TO)") { items { id } } }
[GQL-EXEC discover_pts_product]
[GQL-CAPTURE discover_pts_product.data.products.items.0.id → PTS_PRODUCT_ID]
[GQL-OP add_usd_item]
  mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" productId: "@td(BUYABLE_NO_MIN_QTY.id)" quantity: 1 }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC add_usd_item]
[GQL-OP apply_coupon]
  mutation { addCoupon(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" cultureName: "en-US" couponCode: "@td(COUPONS.percentageCode)" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC apply_coupon]
[GQL-OP add_pts_item]
  mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" productId: "{{PTS_PRODUCT_ID}}" quantity: 1 itemCurrencyCode: "@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code)" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC add_pts_item]
[GQL-OP read_after_add]
  query { cart(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US") { discounts { amount coupon } items { id currencyCode quantity extendedPrice { amount } } } }
[GQL-EXEC read_after_add]
[GQL-CAPTURE read_after_add.data.cart.discounts[?coupon=@td(COUPONS.percentageCode)].amount → DISC_Q1]
[GQL-CAPTURE read_after_add.data.cart.items[?currencyCode=@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code)].id → PTS_LINE_ID]
[GQL-CAPTURE read_after_add.data.cart.items[?currencyCode=@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code)].extendedPrice.amount → PTS_UNIT_VALUE]
[GQL-OP step_q2]
  mutation { changeCartItemQuantity(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" lineItemId: "{{PTS_LINE_ID}}" quantity: 2 }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC step_q2]
[GQL-OP read_q2]
  query { cart(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US") { discounts { amount coupon } items { currencyCode quantity } } }
[GQL-EXEC read_q2]
[GQL-CAPTURE read_q2.data.cart.discounts[?coupon=@td(COUPONS.percentageCode)].amount → DISC_Q2]
[GQL-OP step_q3]
  mutation { changeCartItemQuantity(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" lineItemId: "{{PTS_LINE_ID}}" quantity: 3 }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC step_q3]
[GQL-OP read_q3]
  query { cart(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US") { discounts { amount coupon } items { currencyCode quantity } } }
[GQL-EXEC read_q3]
[GQL-CAPTURE read_q3.data.cart.discounts[?coupon=@td(COUPONS.percentageCode)].amount → DISC_Q3]
[GQL-OP cleanup_post]
  mutation { clearCart(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC cleanup_post]
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] Coupon discount must be invariant to PTS quantity: DISC_Q1 == DISC_Q2 == DISC_Q3. Per-step delta (DISC_Q2-DISC_Q1) reveals leak magnitude = 10% x PTS unit value. PTS_UNIT_VALUE captured for the expected-delta computation.
Failure_Signals: Discount grows by 10% x PTS unit value per qty step (PTS folded into cart-% coupon base).

[GQL-EXEC cart_mixed]
[GQL-CAPTURE cart_mixed.data.cart.discounts[?coupon=@td(COUPONS.fixedAmountCode)].amount → COUPON_DISC_MIX]

  query { cart(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US") { discounts { amount coupon } cartTotals { isDefaultTotalCurrency subTotal { amount } } items { currencyCode quantity } } }
[GQL-EXEC read_u3]
[GQL-CAPTURE read_u3.data.cart.discounts[?coupon=@td(COUPONS.percentageCode)].amount → DISC_U3]

  mutation { clearCart(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC cleanup_post]
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=read_all_selected] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=unselect_pts] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=read_pts_unsel] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=unselect_usd] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=read_usd_unsel] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=reselect_all] errors[] empty
[DATA label=read_all_selected] data.cart.discounts[?coupon=@td(COUPONS.percentageCode)].amount is non-null
[VAR] {{DISC_RESELECT_ALL}} = {{DISC_ALL}}

Failure_Signals: unselect/select mutation errors[] non-empty (lineItemIds contract wrong); coupon does NOT change on unselect (base ignores selection - different RCA); re-select-all does not restore leaked value.

Title: Mixed-cart DELETE PTS line from coupon'd cart — USD coupon discount + USD bucket total must be unchanged
Section: GraphQL > xCart > Mixed Cart > Coupon Leak Repro
Preconditions: Runner-native. LOYALTY_VIP_USER. Build baseline mixed cart (1x USD BUYABLE_NO_MIN_QTY + 1x live-discovered PTS) + QA10OFF. Capture USD coupon discount + USD bucket total BEFORE, then removeCartItem the PTS line, capture AFTER. Per AC the PTS line was never a legitimate part of the USD coupon base, so deleting it must leave the USD coupon discount and USD bucket total IDENTICAL. Predicted actual (RewardExtensions.cs:201 selection-driven cross-currency base, no currency filter): coupon drops 24->16 and USD bucket total recalculates upward by ~10% x PTS value on deletion. cartTotals 2->1 (PTS bucket disappears) is correct/by-design.
Steps:
[AUTH role=LOYALTY_VIP_USER]
[GQL-OP setup_me]
  query { me { id } }
[GQL-EXEC setup_me]
[GQL-CAPTURE setup_me.data.me.id → USER_ID]
[GQL-OP cleanup_pre]
  mutation { clearCart(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC cleanup_pre]
[GQL-OP discover_pts_product]
  query { products(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" currencyCode: "@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code)" first: 1 filter: "category.subtree:@td(VIRTUAL_CATALOG_B2B.id) price.@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code):(0 TO)") { items { id } } }
[GQL-EXEC discover_pts_product]
[GQL-CAPTURE discover_pts_product.data.products.items.0.id → PTS_PRODUCT_ID]
[GQL-OP add_usd_item]
  mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" productId: "@td(BUYABLE_NO_MIN_QTY.id)" quantity: 1 }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC add_usd_item]
[GQL-OP apply_coupon]
  mutation { addCoupon(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" cultureName: "en-US" couponCode: "@td(COUPONS.percentageCode)" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC apply_coupon]
[GQL-OP add_pts_item]
  mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" productId: "{{PTS_PRODUCT_ID}}" quantity: 1 itemCurrencyCode: "@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code)" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC add_pts_item]
[GQL-OP cart_before]
  query { cart(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US") { itemsCount discounts { amount coupon } cartTotals { isDefaultTotalCurrency discountTotal { amount } total { amount currency { code } } } items { id currencyCode quantity extendedPrice { amount } } } }
[GQL-EXEC cart_before]
[GQL-CAPTURE cart_before.data.cart.discounts[?coupon=@td(COUPONS.percentageCode)].amount → DISC_BEFORE]
[GQL-CAPTURE cart_before.data.cart.cartTotals[?isDefaultTotalCurrency=true].total.amount → USD_TOTAL_BEFORE]
[GQL-CAPTURE cart_before.data.cart.items[?currencyCode=USD].extendedPrice.amount → USD_EXT]
[GQL-CAPTURE cart_before.data.cart.items[?currencyCode=@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code)].id → PTS_LINE_ID]
[GQL-CAPTURE cart_before.data.cart.items[?currencyCode=@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code)].extendedPrice.amount → PTS_EXT]
[GQL-OP remove_pts]
  mutation { removeCartItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" lineItemId: "{{PTS_LINE_ID}}" }) { id itemsCount } }
[GQL-EXEC remove_pts]
[GQL-OP cart_after]
  query { cart(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US") { itemsCount discounts { amount coupon } cartTotals { isDefaultTotalCurrency discountTotal { amount } total { amount currency { code } } } items { id currencyCode quantity extendedPrice { amount } } } }
[GQL-EXEC cart_after]
[GQL-CAPTURE cart_after.data.cart.discounts[?coupon=@td(COUPONS.percentageCode)].amount → DISC_AFTER]
[GQL-CAPTURE cart_after.data.cart.cartTotals[?isDefaultTotalCurrency=true].total.amount → USD_TOTAL_AFTER]
[GQL-OP cleanup_post]
  mutation { clearCart(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC cleanup_post]
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=cart_before] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=remove_pts] errors[] empty
[ERRORS label=cart_after] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=cart_before] data.cart.cartTotals = 2
[COUNT label=cart_after] data.cart.cartTotals = 1
[DATA label=cart_after] data.cart.itemsCount = 1
[DATA label=cart_after] data.cart.cartTotals[?isDefaultTotalCurrency=true].total.currency.code = USD
[VAR] {{DISC_AFTER}} = {{DISC_BEFORE}}
[VAR] {{USD_TOTAL_AFTER}} = {{USD_TOTAL_BEFORE}}
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] DISC_AFTER must equal DISC_BEFORE and USD_TOTAL_AFTER must equal USD_TOTAL_BEFORE (PTS deletion must not change the USD bucket). cartTotals 2->1 + itemsCount->1 is the only legitimate change. Delta DISC_BEFORE-DISC_AFTER = 10% x PTS value quantifies the leak removed on deletion.
Failure_Signals: Coupon discount drops on PTS deletion (PTS was in the base); USD bucket total recalculates upward by 10% x PTS value; removeCartItem errors[] non-empty.
References: VCST-5101 Bug-1; RewardExtensions.cs:201 (x-cart feat/VCST-5101 — SelectedForCheckout sum, no currency filter); reports/bugs/BUG-mixed-cart-coupon-pts-leaks-into-usd-discount.md; BL-CART-003
